title: EasyBack
description: Simplest /back plugin with full customizability and PlaceholderAPI support.
body:
![EasyBack](https://i.imgur.com/70Ay0I6.png)
![Dependencies](https://i.imgur.com/WirMLAW.png)
[![PAPI](https://i.imgur.com/j82MAT4.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) [![LuckPerms](https://i.imgur.com/7D6JCIn.png)](https://luckperms.net/download)
![Main_EasyBack](https://i.imgur.com/UkuN3in.png)
![cmds_EasyBack](https://i.imgur.com/d9Tkb41.png)
**Looking for support?**
Add me on discord: hawxy2k
Text Transcript EasyBack is a lightweight plugin that adds the /back command in Minecraft. Designed for latest verion (1.21.4) PaperMC, this plugin gives players the ability to return to their previous location with added customization options. 🔹 Features: ✔ Per-Permission Cooldowns – Set different cooldowns based on player ranks or permissions. ✔ World Blacklist – Prevent players from using /back in specific worlds. ✔ Death-Cause Blacklist – Block /back from being used if a player dies in specific ways (e.g., void, lava...). ✔ Customizable Messages – Personalize all plugin messages, including cooldown warnings and teleport notifications. ✔ Death Message – Notify players when they can use /back after dying. ✔ PlaceholderAPI Support – Integrate placeholders for better message customization. 🔧 Configuration is easy! The plugin allows full control over cooldowns, blacklists, and messages, ensuring it fits your liking.
